title.en: After all, Ye Tiancai didn't go in for long, wh...

content.en:
When Ye Tian came out of the abyss, it aroused the doubts of these Great Ancestors.

After all, Ye Tiancai didn't go in for long, why did he come out?

"I guess I felt that I couldn't comprehend the Infinite Extreme Dao, and I didn't go out when I thought about it, so I simply came out and gave up my cultivation!"

One of the Great Ancestors thought so.

They didn't speculate, after all, there was no point.

There is no other good place here except for the abyss, and the resources here are also very poor, maybe there were some resources at the beginning, but they have long been consumed by these great ancestors.

Therefore, for Ye Tian, there is no value here.

But just as he was about to annihilate this replica body, that high-level immeasurable lifeform came out.

"Meet the Great Ancestor of the Zander!"

"Meet the Great Ancestor of the Zander!"

"Meet the Great Ancestor of the Zander!"

A venerable ancestor said respectfully.

For them, the Great Ancestor of Zander is not only the only high-level immeasurable life here, but also their hope to go out!

After all, they don't have any hope of going out on their own, but the Great Ancestor of Zander may find a way to get out one day, and then it is possible to take them out with him!

Therefore, they have great respect for the great ancestor of the zander perch.

"I've seen the Great Ancestor of Zander!"

Ye Tian also said respectfully.

"There's a newcomer again!"

The Great Ancestor of the Zander only stared at Ye Tian for a second, and he didn't care too much.

After all, Ye Tian was only a primary-level immeasurable life body, even if he cultivated a superior immeasurable body, he couldn't help at all.

Under the expectant gaze of these Great Ancestors, the Great Ancestor of the Zander Perch said: "Fellow Great Ancestors, after all these years of hard cultivation, I have once again created a magic circle, and I need your cooperation to try to see if I can break through this side of the world!"

"We will definitely fully cooperate with the Great Ancestor of Zander!"

Many great ancestors responded.

I saw that the Great Ancestor of the Zander Perch took out a ball of light and gave it to the Great Ancestor present, allowing them to comprehend this set of magic circles.

After a period of time, these Great Ancestors all comprehended this set of magic circles.

Immediately, they began to arrange the magic circle, and the core of the magic circle was naturally the zander ancestor.

Ye Tian was also among them, and he was a little curious about whether the Great Ancestor of the Zander could break this world and break the lost rules.

Soon, the circle was set up.

"Run the circle at full strength!"

The Great Ancestor of the Zander ordered.

Rumble!!!!

The entire magic circle was in operation, and the terrifying power made this red mountain range begin to vibrate, and time and space seemed to collapse.

And the zander ancestor was blessed by the power of the great array, holding a spear in his hand, and stabbed at a certain node.

Hiss!

The node was pierced, and in an instant a fog emerged.

And out of the fog came a pair of eyes, and those eyes seemed to be filled with anger.

Rise!

As if with the roar of an unknown creature, the body of the Great Ancestor of the Zander was directly shattered, and the other Great Ancestors were also implicated and were severely injured.

Of course, the Great Ancestor of Zander did not die and quickly healed his body, but this operation failed.

And the entire circle was completely reduced to ashes.

"This plan failed, I'll go back to heal, and I'll talk about it next time!"

With that, the Great Ancestor of the Zander left.

At this time, those great ancestors who had been hit hard looked at each other one by one.

"I saw a pair of eyes in the mist, what was that?"

"The coercion of those eyes is terrifying, beyond our thoughts, fortunately it is aimed at the Great Ancestor of Zander, otherwise if it is aimed at us, we will all be killed in seconds!"

"I wonder what kind of creature it is, or some kind of forbidden power?"

"It shouldn't be a creature, how can there be any creature here that can threaten a high-level immeasurable lifeform!"

What these Great Ancestors didn't notice was that Ye Tian's expression showed a strange look at this moment.

Because when the magic circle was urging, his mind was also connected to the magic circle, and he could naturally sense the eyes in the mist.

He couldn't peek into those eyes, but the talent for copying did.

"Lost Behemoth!"

This is the information that the talent of copying peeks through those eyes.

This creature is called the Lost Behemoth, and it has an immeasurable ancestral endowment - Lost!

And at this moment, he had already copied this immeasurable ancestral endowment.

"Could it be that the Lost Beast has something to do with the Lost Beast of the Immeasurable Sea of Suffering? Or is it because of this Lost Behemoth that the Lost Sea of Infinite Suffering makes the Great Ancestors lost? Or is it because the Lost Environment of the Infinite Sea of Suffering gave birth to the Lost Behemoth?"

Ye Tian didn't know what kind of situation it was, but the Lost Behemoth was really terrifying.

His copying talent couldn't even perceive the true strength of the Lost Behemoth, only that the Lost Behemoth's strength surpassed that of the Great Ancestor of the Zander.

"If I copied and fused the Lost Immeasurable Ancestral Endowment, wouldn't I be lost?"

Ye Tian muttered.

So, he began to merge with the Lost Immeasurable Ancestral Endowment.

It didn't take long for him to officially possess this immeasurable ancestral endowment.

Immediately afterward, he let a copy of the body enter the immeasurable sea of suffering.

This replica body possessed the Lost Immeasurable Ancestral Endowment, and after urging this Immeasurable Ancestral Endowment, he suddenly discovered a different situation.

"It's really hard for me to get lost!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although he had not yet encountered the Lost Land, after entering the immeasurable sea of suffering, it was as if he had entered any other normal place, and he could directly identify the direction without deduction, which was something that could not be done in the past.

Immediately, he came to a lost place before he came, and he escaped directly into it, and then walked out again.

"Sure enough, such a lost place can't trap me anymore!"

Immediately, he re-entered the Lost Land, wanting to explore the truth and see what the nature of the Lost Land was.

The Lost Land is very large, and although he is no longer affected by the Lost, his speed, perception, and movement are still seriously affected, which is an indelible impact.

Ye Tian kept shuttling in this lost place, and finally met a great ancestor.

This is a primary-level immeasurable great ancestor, and he is constantly spinning in circles at the moment.

When Ye Tian approached the other party, this Great Ancestor directly attacked him, similar to being hit by an illusion.

But Ye Tian knew very well that this was not an illusion, but that the other party was lost, and the world that the other party was in now was completely different from the world he was in.

As a result, no matter what, he should not try to help the other party get rid of the lost, unless he can break the root of this lost land and restore this lost land to normal.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian left here directly and continued to move forward.

It didn't take long for him to finally find the roots of this lost land.
